name: Pepper Steak W/Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix 2 teaspoons cornstarch, soy sauce, 1 teaspoon sugar, pinch of salt and pepper. Add the sirloin slices.
2. Marinate for 10 to 15 minutes.
3. Drain the sirloin and fry in a small amount of hot oil over high heat until it loses its red color.
4. Push the meat to the outer edge of the pan. Add a small amount of oil, then cook onion, green peppers, and celery for 5 minutes.
5. Make a paste with 2 tablespoons cornstarch and cold water. Stir in 1 teaspoon sugar, MSG, salt, and pepper to taste.
6. Add this mixture to the sirloin; stir until the sauce is clear.
7. Add tomatoes and green onions, then remove from heat. Serve.
